project: Antibody sequence ML and existing-record prioritization

final_selected_model.feature_representation: compact heavy/light whole-pair character k-mer TF-IDF
final_selected_model.selection_reason: Selected broad scorer after matched benchmark, source-holdout, and source-robust model-selection checks.

validation.interpretation: Performance was strong under V-gene grouped validation but modest under source-holdout validation, indicating public-label source/study effects.

calibration_and_thresholds.interpretation: Threshold 0.7 is a high-confidence review cutoff for existing records, not a calibrated guarantee of future assay outcome.

oas_background_retrieval.interpretation: OAS retrieval measures separability from unknown-target natural antibody background and is not binder-vs-non-binder prediction.

limitations: model probabilities are prioritization signals, not calibrated prospective neutralisation probabilities
OAS is unknown-target background, not true negatives
existing-record review and public-data benchmarking scope
